title: O Shout to God with Joy

verses.text: O come and see what God has done; how awesome in his deeds to men is God among the nations. He turned the sea to desert land; we crossed by foot on river sand and there sang jubilation. King forever, God in watchful observation rules the nations. Let no rebel rise against him!

O peoples, bless our God and sound his praise, who makes our life abound and keeps our feet from falling. Like silver in a furnace tried, you tested us and purified; you caught us in your netting. You, Lord, crushed us – fire and water came upon us, men rode o’er us. Yet to bounty you have brought us!
